reviews.review_description:
This is yet another 360° video streaming platform - because it seems there is not enough fragmentation in this area...

This app lacks even basic playback functionality (there's no way to even pause a video), and currently provides only 12 monoscopic 360° videos in three categories: music, documentary and "hobby" (if your hobbies are planes or cats).

For those of you who want to give it a try but don't speak Japanese, don't worry, the interface is simple enough.

I run it on a Note 4 and there was some jitter and tearing, and also plenty of buffering on most videos.
